The '''light exoskeleton''' was a type of power-assisted [[exoskeleton]] that functioned as light armor. It mimicked the major muscle movements of the wearer with mechanical impulses, giving him or her greater strength and reaction times. The armor was relatively new during the [[Jedi Civil War]] in [[3956 BBY]]. A set of the armor was owned by the [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Suvam Tan]], who lived in the [[Yavin Station]] orbiting [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin Prime]].<ref name="KOTOR" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:LightExoskeletonIcon.png|thumb|left|In-game Icon]]
The Light exoskeleton appeared in the [[2003]]<ref name="KOTOR 1 Date">{{SW|url=news/kotor-galaxy-of-heroes|text=BioWare and Capital Games on Bringing ''KotOR'' Fan Favorites into ''Galaxy of Heroes''|nolive=1}}</ref> [[roleplaying game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]].'' Its appearance was identical to that of the [[Electromesh]] suit, which appeared in the [[2004]]<ref name="KOTOR II Date">{{GameSpot|url=star-wars-knights-of-the-old-republic-ii-the-sit|text=''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II - Rise of the Sith Lords''}}</ref> sequel, ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]].''<ref name="KOTOR II">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>
